replies.msg:
睇民間衛生局channel
好多人唔知揀咩口罩好，我自己整咗個list（純粹個人意見）

1.3M N95 1870（FOR醫療用）
2.3M N95 1860（FOR醫療用）
3.3M N95 8210（FOR地盤用所以防菌方面差少少）
4.3M N95 9010（FOR地盤用所以防菌方面差少少+比較難透氣）
5.NASK N99 （品牌唔出名，驚無保證所以擺後面）
6.豬啫加p99-100 過濾器都得（太大舊）
7.藍鷹牌 N95 （品牌唔出名+睇個樣好似好薄所以擺後面，可平常戴）
8.外科口罩（可平常戴，其實外科口罩都ok）
9.海綿口罩/冇戴口罩/純棉口罩
口罩報料: @hongkonger_00

新口號:「愛國愛黨 咪嚟香港」

😷民間衛生局😷
@hongkonger_000

希望可以幫到你啦下

n95=
NIOSH to be at least 95% efficient when tested against very “small” particles that are the most difficult size to filter (approximately 0.3 microns).

防唔防到菌佢地係用BFE黎test
BFE stands for Bacterial Filtration Efficiency. This test evaluates how well a surgical mask can prevent biological particles from being expelled by the wearer into the environment. Bioaerosol particles generated during the BFE test are “large,” on the order of 1 to 5 microns in size. For comparison, particles used for respirator filter efficiency tests are much smaller, approximately 0.3 microns MMAD in size.
呢度講到用黎test菌既標準根本仲鬆過用黎test防唔防到菌既標準

咁點解有啲n95係可以用係手術,有啲又唔得?
只係因為fluid resistant
They are also fluid resistant to help reduce exposure to blood and body fluids
簡單講就係做手術機會有d fluid噴到你一面都係
所以一定要用防液(水)既口罩
而#10就係比較緊呢樣野, 而唔係比較緊佢地filter到既particle size
留意#10最後貼果張圖都有寫住
”if fluid resistance and use in surgery....are not requipments for use in your facility....allow ANY NIOSH N95..to be selected to help reduce exposure to airborne biological paritcles....”

總結就係即係防唔防到菌,係睇係唔係n95, 再睇防唔防水
n95防到既particle size已經足夠防菌,唔存在話某啲n95大啲,某啲n95細啲既問題

我又特登搵番3M啲factsheet黎睇
希望可以幫到你啦下

n95=
NIOSH to be at least 95% efficient when tested against very “small” particles that are the most difficult size to filter (approximately 0.3 microns).

防唔防到菌佢地係用BFE黎test
BFE stands for Bacterial Filtration Efficiency. This test evaluates how well a surgical mask can prevent biological particles from being expelled by the wearer into the environment. Bioaerosol particles generated during the BFE test are “large,” on the order of 1 to 5 microns in size. For comparison, particles used for respirator filter efficiency tests are much smaller, approximately 0.3 microns MMAD in size.
呢度講到用黎test菌既標準根本仲鬆過用黎test防唔防到菌既標準

咁點解有啲n95係可以用係手術,有啲又唔得?
只係因為fluid resistant
They are also fluid resistant to help reduce exposure to blood and body fluids
簡單講就係做手術機會有d fluid噴到你一面都係
所以一定要用防液(水)既口罩
而#10就係比較緊呢樣野, 而唔係比較緊佢地filter到既particle size
留意#10最後貼果張圖都有寫住
”if fluid resistance and use in surgery....are not requipments for use in your facility....allow ANY NIOSH N95..to be selected to help reduce exposure to airborne biological paritcles....”

總結就係即係防唔防到菌,係睇係唔係n95, 再睇防唔防水
n95防到既particle size已經足夠防菌,唔存在話某啲n95大啲,某啲n95細啲既問題
病毒同細菌差好多倍wo

從來你地都只係比較緊佢可唔可以用黎「做手術」
Respirators may help reduce exposures to airborne biological contaminants, but they don’t eliminate the risk of exposure, infection, illness, or death.

replies.msg:
簡單講
係

另外又搵多個有關sars既study希望解釋到你疑慮
Professor M Fang of HKUST explained that in terms of anaerosol effect, sneezing could have an ejection velocity ofup to 100 km per hour. Roughly speaking, the number ofdroplets produced from coughing is about 40 000, talking10 000, and singing 1000. Droplets vary in size from 50microns to 3 microns, a cross-section of a human hair beingapproximately 50 microns as a comparison. Large dropletsdo not travel far. Droplets of 3 microns in size can stay inthe air for 3 hours. The coronavirus is approximately 0.1micron in size. The N95 mask filters 95% of particles with0.1 micron in size

而家一般都認為SARS本身唔係空氣傳播,而係靠飛沫(即係上面講果D DROPLET),即係你要考慮佢防唔防到係睇佢傳播既媒介,而唔係睇佢自己有幾細，佢自己一隻病毒係走唔到入你身體的
如果以droplet細極都係3 microns黎計,n95係防到果d droplet,從而防到SARS的
